code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let raw = io.read_to_end()
  let input = "#{raw} "
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut evens = ""
  mut odds = ""
  mut even_first = true
  mut odd_first = true
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            if even_first
              evens = "#{v}"
              even_first = false
            else
              evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
            end
          else
            if odd_first
              odds = "#{v}"
              odd_first = false
            else
              odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("evens=#{evens}")
  println("odds=#{odds}")
end
